sentences.en: The retention curve flattened at Day 30, indicating we found product-market fit for this segment.
sentences.zh: 留存曲线在第30天趋平，说明我们在这个细分市场找到了产品-市场契合。

sentences.en: We reduced the cost per install by 25% through programmatic ad buying.
sentences.zh: 通过程序化广告采购，我们将每次安装成本降低了25%。

sentences.en: The gamification features increased the 7-day engagement rate from 35% to 52%.
sentences.zh: 游戏化功能将7日互动率从35%提升到了52%。

sentences.en: We should test different value propositions in the ad copy for each audience segment.
sentences.zh: 我们应该针对每个受众分层在广告文案中测试不同的价值主张。

sentences.en: The referral reward structure needs to balance incentive generosity with unit economics.
sentences.zh: 推荐奖励结构需要在激励力度和单位经济模型之间取得平衡。

example.en: A healthy retention curve flattens rather than declining to zero.
example.zh: 健康的留存曲线会趋平，而不是下降到零。

example.en: Programmatic advertising uses algorithms to buy and optimize ad placements.
example.zh: 程序化广告使用算法来购买和优化广告位。

example.en: Gamification elements like badges and streaks boost daily active usage.
example.zh: 徽章和连续打卡等游戏化元素能提高日活跃使用率。

example.en: A clear value proposition answers why a customer should choose your product.
example.zh: 清晰的价值主张回答了客户为什么应该选择你的产品。

example.en: Cash incentives drove higher referral rates than non-monetary rewards.
example.zh: 现金激励比非货币奖励带来了更高的推荐率。

sentences.en: The service mesh architecture improved the observability of inter-service communication.
sentences.zh: 服务网格架构提升了服务间通信的可观测性。

sentences.en: We achieved 99.95% uptime this quarter, which meets our SLA commitment.
sentences.zh: 本季度我们实现了99.95%的可用率，达到了SLA承诺。

sentences.en: The user persona document needs to be updated based on the latest survey data.
sentences.zh: 用户画像文档需要根据最新的调研数据进行更新。

sentences.en: The edge case handling in the payment flow caused a 0.3% failure rate.
sentences.zh: 支付流程中的边界情况处理导致了0.3%的失败率。

sentences.en: We should deprecate the v1 API and encourage all partners to migrate to v2.
sentences.zh: 我们应该弃用v1 API，鼓励所有合作伙伴迁移到v2。

example.en: Good observability helps engineers debug production issues faster.
example.zh: 良好的可观测性帮助工程师更快地调试生产问题。

vocabulary.meaning: 可用时间；正常运行时间

example.en: Our target is 99.99% uptime for all customer-facing services.
example.zh: 我们的目标是所有面向客户的服务达到99.99%的可用率。

example.en: Each persona represents a distinct user type with unique needs and behaviors.
example.zh: 每个用户画像代表一种有独特需求和行为的用户类型。

example.en: Testing edge cases prevents rare but critical failures in production.
example.zh: 测试边界情况可以防止生产中罕见但关键的故障。

example.en: We will deprecate the old SDK with a 6-month migration window.
example.zh: 我们将弃用旧SDK，提供6个月的迁移窗口。

sentences.en: The stock repurchased $500 million worth of shares in the open market.
sentences.zh: 该公司在公开市场回购了价值5亿美元的股票。

sentences.en: Gross merchandise value grew 60% but revenue only grew 20% due to lower take rates.
sentences.zh: GMV增长了60%，但由于佣金率降低，收入仅增长了20%。

sentences.en: The EBITDA margin expanded to 28%, up from 22% in the same period last year.
sentences.zh: EBITDA利润率扩大至28%，高于去年同期的22%。

sentences.en: The lockup period expires next month, which could increase selling pressure.
sentences.zh: 禁售期下个月到期，这可能会增加抛售压力。

sentences.en: The risk-adjusted return on this investment is superior to most alternatives.
sentences.zh: 这项投资的风险调整后回报优于大多数替代选项。

example.en: Share repurchase programs signal management's confidence in the stock.
example.zh: 股票回购计划表明管理层对股价有信心。

example.en: The platform's take rate is 3% of each transaction value.
example.zh: 平台对每笔交易收取3%的佣金率。

example.en: EBITDA is commonly used to compare profitability across companies.
example.zh: EBITDA通常用于比较不同公司之间的盈利能力。

example.en: Insiders cannot sell their shares during the lockup period after an IPO.
example.zh: IPO后的禁售期内，内部人士不能出售其股票。

example.en: The Sharpe ratio measures risk-adjusted return relative to a risk-free asset.
example.zh: 夏普比率衡量相对于无风险资产的风险调整后回报。

sentences.en: The OKR scoring shows we achieved 70% of our ambitious targets, which is a healthy result.
sentences.zh: OKR打分显示我们完成了70%的激进目标，这是一个健康的结果。

sentences.en: We need to address the communication silo between the Hong Kong and Singapore offices.
sentences.zh: 我们需要解决香港和新加坡办公室之间的沟通壁垒。

sentences.en: The probation review for the three new hires is scheduled for next Friday.
sentences.zh: 三位新员工的试用期评审定在下周五。

sentences.en: I recommend rotating team leads across projects to broaden their management experience.
sentences.zh: 我建议在项目间轮换团队负责人以拓宽其管理经验。

sentences.en: The employer branding initiative helped us attract 40% more qualified candidates.
sentences.zh: 雇主品牌建设帮助我们吸引了多40%的合格候选人。

example.en: OKR scoring at 60-70% typically indicates the goals were appropriately ambitious.
example.zh: OKR打分在60-70%通常表明目标设定了适当的挑战性。

example.en: Breaking down silos between departments improves collaboration and speed.
example.zh: 打破部门之间的信息孤岛能改善协作和速度。

example.en: The standard probation period for all new hires is three months.
example.zh: 所有新员工的标准试用期为三个月。

example.en: Rotating on-call duty ensures no one person carries all the burden.
example.zh: 轮换值班制度确保不会让一个人承担所有负担。

example.en: Strong employer branding reduces hiring costs and attracts top talent.
example.zh: 强大的雇主品牌能降低招聘成本并吸引顶尖人才。

sentences.en: The bottom-up market sizing approach yielded a more conservative estimate than top-down.
sentences.zh: 自下而上的市场规模估算方法得出了比自上而下更保守的数字。

sentences.en: We should differentiate on service quality rather than competing solely on price.
sentences.zh: 我们应该在服务质量上做差异化，而非仅靠价格竞争。

sentences.en: The strategic review concluded that the wealth management vertical has the highest ROI potential.
sentences.zh: 战略评审得出结论，财富管理垂直领域的ROI潜力最高。

sentences.en: Our defensive strategy involves building data network effects that competitors cannot replicate.
sentences.zh: 我们的防御策略包括建立竞争者无法复制的数据网络效应。

sentences.en: The licensing requirement in each market adds 6 months to our expansion timeline.
sentences.zh: 每个市场的牌照要求为我们的扩张时间表增加了6个月。

example.en: A bottom-up forecast builds from individual customer segments to the total.
example.zh: 自下而上的预测从单个客户群体汇总到整体。

example.en: We differentiate by offering real-time market data that competitors charge extra for.
example.zh: 我们通过提供竞争对手额外收费的实时行情数据来实现差异化。

example.en: The fintech vertical is one of the fastest-growing segments in Asia.
example.zh: 金融科技垂直领域是亚洲增长最快的板块之一。

example.en: Proprietary data assets are hard to replicate, making them a durable advantage.
example.zh: 专有数据资产难以复制，使其成为持久的优势。

example.en: The project timeline was extended by two months due to regulatory delays.
example.zh: 由于监管延误，项目时间表延长了两个月。
